(sub-sim
          (begin
            (define candidates (filter (lambda (r) (> (nth r 1) 10)) my-relationships))
            (define best (if (empty? candidates) my-id (nth (car candidates) 0)))

diary_entries.entry: Another year. New mineral deposits discovered. The colony feels hopeful. My faith grows stronger.
Population: 27. New mineral deposits discovered. I spent the year on terraforming. Closest to Lyra.
The resource_strike changed everything. I feel optimistic about our future here.

meta_awareness: Lyra (year 59): 'If I can spawn a sub-simulation to test governance, who spawned the simulation I live in to test THEIR governance?'
